name: Nicci's Peppering Petal Pecks
descrip: Force an intoxicating aphrodisiac into your prey.
outcome: Nicci coos cheerfully as she delicately cups your chin to plant loving kisses all across your face with her plump lips, leaving pure-white smooch marks all over you that hotly thrum with floral aphrodisiac, the warm indulgent sensation intermixing with the pampering shower of mind-blanking kisses.
miss: Nicci coos cheerfully as she delicately cups your chin to plant loving kisses all across your face with her plump lips, but you manage to endure the shower of pampering floral smooches!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can feel the smooch marks instill giddy lust straight into his mind, the giddy oozing pleasure coaxing a thoughtless sigh of blissful relaxation out of him.
